source_pages.title: Attensify — AI-Powered Digital Marketing Platform for Businesses
Pricing — AI Marketing Platform Plans | Attensify
Creator Programme — Earn While You Grow | Attensify

evidence: Homepage title: "Attensify — AI-Powered Digital Marketing Platform for Businesses"
Pricing page and creator page both use Attensify branding

one_sentence_description.value: AI marketing platform that plans, executes, and optimizes content, ads, SEO, blogs, and website updates autonomously.
evidence: Homepage: "plans, executes, and optimizes your content, ads, SEO, blog, and website — autonomously"
Homepage: "Your AI marketing team. Always on."
Homepage: "AI marketing platform"
Pricing page: "AI Marketing Platform Pricing"

business_model.value: Freemium SaaS subscription with tiered monthly plans and a creator referral program
evidence: Pricing page: Starter is free forever; Growth is "$49/mo"; Scale is "$129/mo"
Pricing page: "14-Day Free Trial" and month-to-month language
Creator page: "30% recurring commission" for referrals

stage_or_maturity.value: early-growth SaaS with live pricing and claimed customer traction
evidence: Homepage: "Trusted by 67+ businesses across 5 countries"
Pricing page with live plan tiers and FAQ
Homepage: "Free plan, no expiry" and "Live in 15 minutes"

primary_icp.value: SMBs and growing businesses that want to automate digital marketing
primary_icp.description: Primary buyers appear to be solo founders, growing businesses, and SMB teams looking to manage content, ads, SEO, and website updates in one system.
evidence: Pricing page: "Plans for SMBs and Agencies"
Pricing page: Starter is "For solo founders getting started" and Growth is "For growing businesses scaling up"
Homepage: repeated emphasis on running marketing for "businesses" and "growing businesses"

secondary_audiences.description: Agencies needing multi-client management, white-label reporting, and collaboration features.
evidence: Pricing page: "For agencies & enterprise teams"
Pricing page: Scale includes "White-label reports", "Multi-client dashboard", and "Dedicated account manager"

secondary_audiences.description: Creators who join the referral program to promote Attensify and earn recurring commission.
evidence: Creator page: "Turn your audience into recurring income"
Creator page: "Any content creator, marketer, or digital professional with under 50K followers"

audience_notes.value: The product page also shows examples from e-commerce, SaaS, consulting, and agency contexts, but those appear to be illustrative rather than exclusive ICPs.
evidence: Homepage: industry examples include E-commerce, SaaS, Agency, Consulting
Pricing page and homepage consistently emphasize SMBs, growing businesses, and agencies

buyer_pains.pain: Managing content, ads, SEO, and website updates across separate tools is time-consuming and fragmented.
buyer_pains.description: The platform repeatedly frames itself as a single system to replace juggling multiple marketing tools.
evidence: Homepage testimonial: "Our team used to juggle four separate tools."
Homepage: "one platform" and "single source of truth" messaging

buyer_pains.pain: Teams spend too much time manually planning, scheduling, and publishing marketing content.
buyer_pains.description: Copy emphasizes saving hours and automating planning and posting.
evidence: Homepage testimonial: "70% less planning time"
Homepage: content module says it "writes, schedules, and publishes"

buyer_pains.pain: Businesses need better ad performance and budget efficiency.
buyer_pains.description: The ads module stresses autonomous budget optimization, A/B testing, and ROAS improvement.
evidence: Homepage: "AI launches and optimizes campaigns"
Homepage testimonial: "Our Meta ad ROAS jumped from 1.2x to 1.8x"

buyer_pains.pain: SEO work is hard to keep up with and difficult to translate into rankings.
buyer_pains.description: The site positions SEO as continuous monitoring, auditing, and gap-finding to reach page 1.
evidence: Homepage: "AI finds gaps and fixes them automatically"
Homepage testimonial: "We went from page 4 to page 2"

buyer_pains.pain: Agencies need easier multi-client management and reporting.
buyer_pains.description: Agency-specific plans highlight white-label reports and a multi-client dashboard.
evidence: Pricing page: Scale includes "white-label reports" and "multi-client dashboard"
Testimonial: "Managing 6 client accounts was chaos before this"

product_capabilities.capability: plans and orchestrates marketing work from a plain-English prompt
product_capabilities.description: Users describe goals in natural language and the system breaks them into parallel workstreams.
evidence: Homepage: "Tell it what you want. Watch it work."
Homepage: "Type what you want in plain English" and it "breaks it into a full marketing plan"

product_capabilities.capability: writes, schedules, and publishes content across multiple social platforms
product_capabilities.description: Content module generates on-brand posts and auto-publishes them.
evidence: Homepage: "AI writes in your brand voice" and "Auto-schedules"
Homepage: "Publishes to 15+ platforms simultaneously"

product_capabilities.description: Ads module creates campaigns, writes copy, allocates budget, and tunes performance.
evidence: Homepage: "writes the copy, allocates spend across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn"
Homepage: "Automated A/B testing" and "Real-time ROAS dashboard"

product_capabilities.capability: researches, writes, and publishes SEO blog articles
product_capabilities.description: Blog module generates SEO-optimized long-form content from a topic or keyword.
evidence: Homepage: "researches the SERP, writes an SEO-optimized long-form article, and publishes"
Homepage: "Auto-generated content briefs"

product_capabilities.capability: tracks rankings and runs technical SEO audits
product_capabilities.description: SEO module monitors keywords, audits technical issues, and analyzes competitors.
evidence: Homepage: "500+ keyword rank tracking"
Homepage: "Automated technical site audits" and "AI competitor gap analysis"

product_capabilities.description: Website module generates layouts, copy, CTAs, and supports A/B testing and Core Web Vitals monitoring.
evidence: Homepage: "AI generates the layout, copy, and CTAs"
Homepage: "Autonomous A/B testing" and "Core Web Vitals monitoring"

product_capabilities.capability: integrates with common marketing tools and platforms
product_capabilities.description: The site lists support for multiple tools and ad/social destinations.
evidence: Homepage: "Works with the tools you already use" followed by WordPress, HubSpot, Ahrefs, Google Ads, SEMrush, Webflow, Hootsuite, Mailchimp, Buffer, Canva
Pricing FAQ: publishes to Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, Threads, plus Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads

product_capabilities.capability: supports team collaboration and multi-client management
product_capabilities.description: Higher tiers include seats, collaboration, and multi-client dashboards.
evidence: Pricing page: Growth includes "Team collaboration (5 seats)"
Pricing page: Scale includes "Multi-client dashboard"

product_capabilities.capability: offers white-label reporting, API access, and custom integrations
product_capabilities.description: These appear as scale-tier capabilities for advanced customers.
evidence: Pricing page: Scale includes "White-label reports", "API access", and "Custom integrations"

product_capabilities.capability: runs a creator referral and commission program
product_capabilities.description: The creator page provides referral links, tracking, and monthly payouts.
evidence: Creator page: "30% recurring commission"
Creator page: "real-time" dashboard and monthly payouts via UPI/bank transfer

positioning_summary.value: Attensify positions itself as an autonomous, all-in-one AI marketing team that replaces fragmented marketing tools and manual execution for SMBs and agencies.
evidence: Homepage: "Your AI marketing team. Always on."
Homepage: "one platform" and "no human hand-holding required"
Pricing page: "Plans for SMBs and Agencies"

primary_differentiators.description: The platform claims to plan and execute content, ads, SEO, blogs, and website work in parallel from one prompt.
evidence: Homepage: "plans, executes, and optimizes"
Homepage: "5 parallel workstreams"

primary_differentiators.description: Attensify emphasizes unifying content, ads, SEO, blog, and website updates in one dashboard.
evidence: Homepage: "AI-powered content, ads, SEO, blog & website — one platform"
Homepage testimonial: "single source of truth"

primary_differentiators.description: The creator program is framed as a no-upfront-cost, recurring-commission channel for acquiring customers.
evidence: Homepage and creator page: creator program promises commission per sale and zero upfront cost
Creator page: "30% recurring commission"

primary_differentiators.description: Higher tiers add white-label reports, multi-client management, API access, SSO, and account management.
evidence: Pricing page: Scale plan includes "White-label reports", "API access", "SSO & RBAC", "Dedicated account manager"

category_point_of_view.value: Marketing should be run by an always-on AI system that unifies strategy, execution, and optimization instead of separate tools and manual handoffs.
evidence: Homepage: "Your AI marketing team. Always on."
Homepage: "no human hand-holding required"
Homepage: "one AI command"

positioning_notes.value: The site uses strong automation language and a broad marketing scope; the core promise is speed, consolidation, and autonomous execution rather than a single-point marketing tool.
evidence: Homepage: "autonomously"
Homepage: "Ship faster. Save hours."
Pricing and testimonials repeatedly stress time savings and consolidation
Homepage: "Tell it what you want. Watch it work."
Brand voice labels on homepage: "Direct", "Authoritative"
Homepage agent example: "On it"

writing_style.value: Punchy, benefit-led, and operational, with short claims, outcome metrics, and product-demo style examples.
evidence: Homepage and pricing pages use short headline statements and metric callouts like "10 hrs saved/mo" and "1.8x ROAS"
Frequent use of module labels and action-oriented language

common_phrases.context: Core homepage positioning for the AI marketing team
evidence: Homepage headline: "Your AI marketing team. Always on."

common_phrases.context: Repeated promise on homepage and closing CTA
evidence: Homepage: "run marketing on autopilot"
Homepage: "no human hand-holding required"
Homepage testimonial: "single source of truth"
Homepage and pricing page CTAs: "Start Free" / "Start for free"

messaging_patterns.pattern: Combines capability claims with outcome metrics such as time saved, ROAS lift, and rank improvement.
messaging_patterns.description: The site repeatedly pairs feature descriptions with quantified results.
evidence: Homepage testimonials: "10 hrs saved/mo", "1.8x ROAS", "Page 2 in 90 days"

messaging_patterns.pattern: Uses demo-like agent walkthroughs to show autonomous workflow execution.
messaging_patterns.description: The homepage includes staged task execution and progress updates to illustrate the product experience.
evidence: Homepage: "5 parallel workstreams" and task timeline / module completion

messaging_patterns.pattern: Frames the product as a replacement for multiple tools and manual coordination.
messaging_patterns.description: Messaging stresses unification of content, ads, SEO, and website work in one place.
evidence: Homepage: "juggle four separate tools" testimonial
Homepage: "one platform" and "single source of truth"

missing_information: Exact company size and founding date are not stated
Pricing details for annual billing discount are not specified
Customer logos and named case studies are limited
Some homepage content appears demo-like and may blur product capabilities with illustrative outputs
potential_risks: Repeated UI/demo sections may make the platform feel broader or more mature than the core evidence supports.
Some claims are presented as performance examples or testimonials and should not be treated as independently verified results.
The creator program page is a separate audience stream and should not be confused with the primary customer ICP.
profile_quality.notes: The crawl provides strong direct evidence across homepage, pricing, and creator pages. Product scope, audience, and positioning are clear, but maturity should be treated as medium-confidence because evidence is limited to marketing pages and self-reported traction.
